#bug #claude-code

# branch and git

Fixed: check branch existence before merging; skip merge if branch is gone.
2026-03-28

if there is no branch to merge, skip that action.

here is the error
---
Git merge failed: Error: Command failed: git merge --no-ff improvement/metadata-visibility-on-card -m "Merge improvement/metadata-visibility-on-card into main" merge: improvement/metadata-visibility-on-card - not something we can merge
